## RK-001 — [Short title]

**Category:** safety | reliability | security | performance | maintainability
**Status:** Open | Mitigated | Retired
**Severity (S):** 1–10
**Occurrence (O):** 1–10
**Detection difficulty (D):** 1–10
**RPN:** S × O × D

**Failure mode:** What could go wrong and under what conditions.

**Consequence:** What happens if this risk materializes.

**Requirements threatened:**
<!-- List requirement or scenario IDs that this risk threatens, e.g. REQ-042, SC-003 -->

**Mitigation:** What code, design, or process addresses this risk.

**Residual risk:** What remains after mitigation.

**Mitigating test(s):**
<!-- Updated by hand or by running: python tools/cli.py check-risks -->
